title: Leveraging Graph Structure in Seq2Seq Models for Knowledge Graph Link Prediction
summary: We introduce Graph-Augmented Sequence-to-Sequence (GA-S2S), a novel framework that integrates a T5-small encoder-decoder with a Relational Graph Attention Network (RGAT) to improve link prediction in knowledge graphs. While existing Seq2Seq models rely solely on surface-level textual descriptions of entities and relations and at best, flatten the neighborhoods of a query entity into a single linear sequence, thereby discarding the inherent graph structure, GA-S2S jointly encodes both textual features and the full $k$-hop subgraph topology surrounding the query entity. By integrating raw encoder outputs with RGAT's relation-aware embeddings, our model captures and leverages richer multi-hop relational patterns and textual information. Our preliminary experiments on the CoDEx dataset demonstrate that GA-S2S outperforms competitive Seq2Seq-based baseline models, achieving up to a 19\% relative gain in link prediction accuracy.
summary_cn: 本论文提出GA-S2S框架，将T5-small编码器-解码器与关系图注意力网络（RGAT）结合，用于知识图谱链接预测。传统Seq2Seq模型仅依赖文本描述，而GA-S2S通过图结构增强，利用实体关系和上下文信息提升预测准确性，弥补了纯文本模型的不足。该技术可应用于推荐系统、智能问答和知识推理等场景，为产品化知识图谱服务提供更可靠的链路预测能力。
patterns: 知识图谱增强的序列模型
